allow:
Bash(fix_path_imports.py << 'EOF'
# Entferne alle "from pathlib import Path" außer Zeile 13
with open\('app.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

new_lines = []
for i, line in enumerate\(lines, 1\):
    # Behalte Zeile 13 \(globales Import\)
    if i == 13:
        new_lines.append\(line\)
    # Entferne andere "from pathlib import Path" Zeilen
    elif line.strip\(\) == "from pathlib import Path":
        continue  # Skip diese Zeile
    else:
        new_lines.append\(line\)

with open\('app.py', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.writelines\(new_lines\)

print\(f"✅ Entfernt {len\(lines\) - len\(new_lines\)} lokale Path-Imports"\)
EOF)
